# clang trunk: assertion failed in cast<IntegerType> during codegen of inline asm with x86 flag output constraints (=@ccXX) on char/pointer operands

**Author:** Theaamadu
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/173917
**Status:** Open
**Labels:** clang:codegen, crash, generated by fuzzer

## Body

## Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/rKvPW9cd5

- clang start crashing on `Trunk`
- generated by fuzzer

## Console
```console
clang: /root/llvm-project/llvm/include/llvm/Support/Casting.h:572: decltype(auto) llvm::cast(From*) [with To = llvm::IntegerType; From = llvm::Type]: Assertion `isa<To>(Val) && "cast<Ty>() argument of incompatible type!"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
```

## Code
```c
void f(char *out) {
  asm(""
      : "=@ccb"(out[0]), "=@ccl"(out[1]), "=@ccz"(out[2]), "=@ccbe"(out[4]),
        "=@ccge"(out), "=@ccle"(out[6]));
}
```

## Code
```c
void f(char *out) {
  asm(""
      : "=@<!-- -->ccb"(out[0]), "=@<!-- -->ccl"(out[1]), "=@<!-- -->ccz"(out[2]), "=@<!-- -->ccbe"(out[4]),
```

---

### Comment 2 - keinflue

Since Clang 15: https://godbolt.org/z/s5TKjobYn

Reduces further to (https://godbolt.org/z/hb93cr7Er)
```cpp
void f(char *out) {
  asm("" : "=@ccg"(out));
}
```
Seems to occur for non-integer types of `out`.


---
